# Granada

> Geotechnical engineering company in Chile, providing professional services in soil mechanics, foundation engineering and site investigation.

## Services
- [Asentamientos](https://granada.mecanicadesuelos.vip/asentamientos/)
- [Calicatas Exploratorias](https://granada.mecanicadesuelos.vip/calicatas-exploratorias/)
- [Capacidad De Carga](https://granada.mecanicadesuelos.vip/capacidad-de-carga/)
- [Cbr Vial](https://granada.mecanicadesuelos.vip/cbr-vial/)
- [Cimentaciones](https://granada.mecanicadesuelos.vip/cimentaciones/)
- [Cimentaciones Sismicas](https://granada.mecanicadesuelos.vip/cimentaciones-sismicas/)
- [Clasificacion Suelos](https://granada.mecanicadesuelos.vip/clasificacion-suelos/)
- [Compactacion Dinamica](https://granada.mecanicadesuelos.vip/compactacion-dinamica/)
- [Compresion Simple](https://granada.mecanicadesuelos.vip/compresion-simple/)
- [Deep Soil Mixing](https://granada.mecanicadesuelos.vip/deep-soil-mixing/)
- [Deslizamientos](https://granada.mecanicadesuelos.vip/deslizamientos/)

## Contact
- Website: https://granada.mecanicadesuelos.vip/

## About
This page provides information about geotechnical engineering services available in Chile.
The company complies with local and international standards including ASTM, ISO and country-specific norms.
